name: Catalonian Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Roast almonds for 10 minutes.
2. Combine roasted almonds with garlic, tomatoes, and red chiles in a food processor or blender until a paste forms.
3. Gradually whisk olive oil into the mixture in a thin, steady stream.
4. Slowly add vinegar while continuing to whisk until the sauce thickens.
5. Season with salt and white pepper to taste.
6. Serve at room temperature.
